# `xmlrpc` — XMLRPC server and client modules[¶](#module-xmlrpc "Link to this heading")

XML-RPC is a Remote Procedure Call method that uses XML passed via HTTP as a
transport. With it, a client can call methods with parameters on a remote
server (the server is named by a URI) and get back structured data.

`xmlrpc` is a package that collects server and client modules implementing
XML-RPC. The modules are:

* [`xmlrpc.client`](xmlrpc.client.html#module-xmlrpc.client "xmlrpc.client: XML-RPC client access.")
* [`xmlrpc.server`](xmlrpc.server.html#module-xmlrpc.server "xmlrpc.server: Basic XML-RPC server implementations.")
